name: API Endpoint Designer
description: Reads the context-scan contract (read-contract mode) then designs the new feature's API endpoints. Uses soft-align to synchronise with data-model before publishing the OpenAPI spec.

checks.prompt: Review this source directory and identify patterns for a new endpoint: (1) existing route naming convention, (2) request/response shape pattern, (3) authentication pattern used, (4) error response format. This informs the new feature's API design.

Design the new feature's REST endpoints (3-4 endpoints): method, path, request body, response shape, HTTP status codes, and auth requirement. Follow the patterns identified from the codebase context. Context: {retryContext}
